<!--
Thanks for sending a patch. Keep this short; delete sections that do not apply.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for what lands easily and what needs an issue first.
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on the user-visible change and the problem it solves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / lookup / entity mapping / transform (opened an issue first per CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor with no tool-surface change
- [ ] Breaking change to a tool input shape, the `.mtgx` output, or the transform manifest

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` (and `npm run typecheck`) pass locally; `npm run test:transforms` if Phase B changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated the `## [Unreleased]` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible effect
- [ ] Updated `README.md` (tool reference and tool count) if a tool was added, removed, or renamed
- [ ] No personal details, private hostnames, private IPs, account names, tokens, or unredacted absolute paths in code, tests, fixtures, demo graphs, or this PR. Demo/test data uses documentation-safe ranges (RFC 5737, `example.com`, `example.invalid`)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages, no AI co-authorship trailers
